J2 | 15 | 4 | 22 | 23
J3 | 30 | 24 | 10 | 31
J4 | 34 | 35 | 30 | 33

J7 | 30 | 10 | 14 | 11
J8 | 35 | 23 | 28 | 24
J9 | 22 | 1 | 16 | 26
J10 | 7 | 8 | 2 | 10
J11 | 20 | 24 | 30 | 13
J12 | 25 | 19 | 3 | 17

Constraints:
- J7 and J9 must use different machines.
- J2 and J9 must use different machines.
- J5 and J11 must use different machines.
- J5 and J9 must use the same machine.
- J2 may use only W or Z.
- J10 may use only X or Z.
- J9 may not use Y.
- J8 may not use X.
- If J1 uses Y, then J4 may not use Z.
- If J5 uses Z, then J6 may not use X.
- If J7 uses X, then J12 may not use W.
- If J3 uses W, then J11 may not use Y.
- Exactly one of J11, J8, and J10 must use Z.
- Exactly one of J9, J8, and J7 must use W.
